mapper.sql: employee_id, name, gender, employee_category, affiliation_id, business_division, nearest_station_1, nearest_station_2, nearest_station_3, contact_info, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (employee_id, name, gender, employee_category, affiliation_id, business_division, nearest_station_1, nearest_station_2, nearest_station_3, contact_info, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{employeeCategory}, #{affiliationId}, #{businessDivision}, #{nearestStation1}, #{nearestStation2}, #{nearestStation3}, CAST(#{contactInfo} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, employee_category = #{employeeCategory}, affiliation_id = #{affiliationId}, business_division = #{businessDivision}, nearest_station_1 = #{nearestStation1}, nearest_station_2 = #{nearestStation2}, nearest_station_3 = #{nearestStation3}, contact_info = CAST(#{contactInfo} AS jsonb), updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE employee SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employee WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM employee WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND (employee_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT FROM employee WHERE affiliation_id = #{affiliationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY employee_id
